name: Koorangie Energy Storage System
notable: 185 MW / 370 MWh grid-forming BESS near Kerang in Victoria's Murray River region. A$400M, developed by Edify Energy, owned by Sosteneo. 15-year Shell Energy offtake for full capacity. 20-year AEMO System Support Agreement for 125 MW of system strength services — one of the first large-scale BESS contracted for this function.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Full commercial operations commence
timeline.detail: 185MW/370MWh grid-forming BESS with 100 Tesla Megapacks in Virtual Machine Mode entered full operations.

timeline.title: 20-year AEMO system strength agreement activated
timeline.detail: Began delivering 125MW of system strength services under 20-year System Support Agreement with AEMO in Murray River REZ.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2025-06 to 2025-06-24 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

eis_specs.document_title: Koorangie Energy Storage System — Planning Permit Application (VIC DEECA)
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Koorangie 220/66 kV substation (AusNet Services), Northern Victoria
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~3 km to AusNet Services Koorangie area 220 kV network, Northern Victoria (Murray-Darling Basin region).
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: AusNet augmentation of Northern Victoria 220 kV network. Grid-forming Tesla Megapack provides synthetic inertia for Northern Victoria-NSW interconnect.
eis_specs.notes: 185 MW / 370 MWh (2-hour) BESS, Koorangie area, Northern Victoria (near Kerang). Developer: Energy Australia. Technology: Tesla Megapack (LFP, grid-forming). EPC: CPP. VIC planning approval 2022. Now operating (2024). Grid-forming provides synthetic inertia for Northern VIC network. AusNet 220 kV connection. VIC CIS contract holder.
